title: Echo Clones
description: Adds the echo totem, an item allowing you to build up an army of yourself.
body:
## Echo Totem

Recipie:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ![renaming examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dbe912c9dfc16af2d758db6ff390b36ec86f834.png)
![recipie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b935c2f557d8fcda234b5cd12d6d5c1f3ab485d.png)

</details>



Use the echo totem to summon a clone of yourself. This clone will pick up items, use gear, and can be set to sit, attack whatever it sees, or follow you.

You can also make clones of other players by renaming the totem to the desired player's name.

Examples:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



![Holding Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52596b50d0acb72fa7b05c37e6ce853a430d1045.png)

</details>
